'''Kaysil Verwood''' was the [[Refugee Relief Movement/Legends|Refugee Relief Movement]] spokesbeing during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A female [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] from [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]], she was an advocate for the rights of non-[[Human/Legends|Humans]] and was married to a Human husband. For both these reasons, she realized she would be targeted by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Following the [[Dissolution of the Imperial Senate/Legends|dissolution of the Imperial Senate]], she and her sister, [[Elibet Dav]], joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], working to find new homes for former slaves liberated from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Iridonia and the Zabrak colony worlds united for the first time and sent a single representative—Kaysil Verwood—to represent them at a Galactic caucus to form the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
